mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER (ORDER_NO, ORDER_TYPE, ACCT_CD, ORDER_DATE, DUE_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, EMP_ID) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{acctCd}, NOW(), #{dueDate}, 'WAIT', #{remark}, #{empId})
INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DETAIL (ORDER_NO, ITEM_CD, QTY, UNIT_PRICE, AMT) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{itemCd}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{qty} * #{unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO LIKE CONCAT('%-', #{dateStr}, '-%')
SELECT ORDER_NO as orderNo, ACCT_CD as acctCd, STATUS as status, ORDER_DATE as orderDate, DUE_DATE as dueDate FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_TYPE = 'BUY' ORDER BY ORDER_DATE DESC

SELECT O.ORDER_NO as orderNo, O.ACCT_CD as acctCd, A.ACCT_NM as acctNm, O.STATUS as status, O.ORDER_DATE as orderDate, O.DUE_DATE as dueDate FROM TB_ORDER O LEFT JOIN TB_ACCOUNT A ON O.ACCT_CD = A.ACCT_CD WHERE O.ORDER_TYPE = 'SELL' ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC

SELECT A.ORDER_NO, A.ACCT_CD, A.ORDER_DATE, A.DUE_DATE, A.STATUS, A.REMARK, B.ITEM_CD, B.QTY, B.UNIT_PRICE, B.AMT FROM TB_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_DETAIL B ON A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO WHERE A.ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
SELECT ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, PRICE, STOCK_QTY as stockQty, UNIT FROM TB_ITEM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ORDER SET STATUS = #{status} WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(STOCK_QTY, 0) FROM TB_ITEM WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ITEM_LOG (ITEM_CD, INOUT_TYPE, QTY, BEFORE_QTY, AFTER_QTY, REF_NO, EMP_ID, REG_DT) SELECT #{itemCd}, 'IN', #{qty}, STOCK_QTY - #{qty}, STOCK_QTY, #{orderNo}, #{empId}, NOW() FROM TB_ITEM WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}

INSERT INTO TB_ITEM_LOG (ITEM_CD, INOUT_TYPE, QTY, BEFORE_QTY, AFTER_QTY, REF_NO, EMP_ID, REG_DT) SELECT #{itemCd}, 'OUT', #{qty}, STOCK_QTY + #{qty}, STOCK_QTY, #{orderNo}, #{empId}, NOW() FROM TB_ITEM WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
